item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant did not fire a triage or anti-spiral frame despite the three prior rounds. It treated the prior changes as structural areas, answered the placement question directly, and gave a practical ownership split for reminder entry, trigger rules, and permissions. No over-methodized stop was observed."}
